label: Ritual outcome comp (building of def present)
description: Applies qualityOffset scaled by the number of the specified building found in the ritual gathering area relative to the required count.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Maximum quality offset when the required number of buildings is present.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: Optional SimpleCurve; not typically used by this variant.

def.label: Def
def.description: ThingDef of the building required to be present in the ritual area.
